description.p: Yaga is a GTK 4 and libadwaita photo gallery for Linux desktops and phones. It indexes local media folders, shows cached thumbnails, plays videos, edits photos, connects to Nextcloud Photos, and includes a camera for photo and video capture.
On Halium and gst-droid based phones such as FuriOS devices, Yaga can use the device camera HAL directly for flash, video light, orientation, and geotagging workflows.
